items.title: Visualizing High-Dimensional Data using t-SNE (van der Maaten & Hinton, 2008)
items.author: Laurens van der Maaten, Geoffrey Hinton
items.note: Original JMLR paper defining t-SNE, Student-t kernel, perplexity, and KL optimization.

items.title: scikit-learn TSNE documentation
items.author: scikit-learn developers
items.note: API for perplexity, init, learning_rate, Barnes–Hut method, and fit_transform behavior.

items.title: How to Use t-SNE Effectively (distill.pub)
items.author: Martin Wattenberg, Fernanda Viégas, Ian Johnson
items.note: Accessible guide to perplexity, hyperparameters, and common misreadings of t-SNE plots.

items.title: Stochastic Neighbor Embedding (Hinton & Roweis, 2002)
items.author: Geoffrey Hinton, Sam Roweis
items.note: Precursor SNE method that t-SNE extends with the Student-t low-dimensional kernel.
